description: Monte-Carlo estimates of SD((C,y), LPN_{p_eff}) for uniform-B-per-A reductions along m=2n
methodology: Uniform Lagrangian A, uniform x, Bernoulli(1/4) noise e, uniform B. Output key (C,y) hashed to a coarse dictionary bucket; empirical total variation computed from Counter histograms. Two coarse partitions are reported: (rank(C), 1{y in col(C)}) and a random 14-bit hash of the full key. Bootstrap standard errors from 2000 multinomial resamples.
